items.title: Hundreds of captives freed from Boko Haram mountain hideout
items.dek: The group includes many women and children who were abducted in March from an area close to Cameroon.
items.body: The group includes many women and children who were abducted in March from an area close to Cameroon.

items.title: Iran's World Cup team lands in Mexico amid US visa row
items.dek: All of Iran's group games are in the US, but players and support staff will have to fly in and out of the country on match day.
